case_title: CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST VS. GEORGE ZEMBERA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-07-2011 CONTINUED TO FEB-25-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) OR FILE DISMISSAL AFTER TERMINATION OF BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
